meta.siteDescription: Personal site about fullstack development, automation, DevOps, and careful LLM experiments.

home.headline: Development across code, automation, and infrastructure.
home.sub: Things I build and try with Next.js, Spring Boot, Postgres, n8n, Docker, and VPS.
home.pillarFullstackDesc: TypeScript, APIs, and data layers—getting projects running and evolving them.
home.pillarAutomationDesc: n8n-style tools for integrations and workflow tinkering.
home.pillarDevopsDesc: Containers, Podman, Dokploy, and VPS—environment setup and deploy practice.
home.pillarAiDesc: Hooking LLM APIs into projects with templates, guardrails, and small experiments.
